global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and sale information.
global.main_message: Promoting a product at a discounted price.

elements.label: green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo

elements.label: SALE badge
